name: Wuxi Taiji Industry Company Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Taiji Industry Company Ltd. primarily engages in semiconductor packaging assembly and test, chemical fibers, tire cord fabrics, and conveyor belt fabrics businesses in China and internationally. The company's semiconductor post processing business is involved in the IC chips probe test, packaging assembly, packaging test, and module assembly and test; and chemical fiber business engages in the research, development, production, and sales of polyester industrial yarns, dipped conveyor belt fabrics, dipped tire cord fabrics, canvas, etc. It is also involved in the engineering design and general contracting business in the field of photovoltaics. The company's products application include agriculture, industry, transportation, infrastructure, environmental protection, construction, protection, automobile manufacturing, etc. The company was founded in 1966 and is based in Wuxi, China.
